spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: First Contact on New Lead
spa.trigger: When a Deal is created or edited

spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: Follow-up on No Answer
spa.trigger: When a Task is created or edited
spa.condition: Task_Outcome is "No Answer" AND Task_Type is "First Contact"

spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: Follow-up 2 on No Answer
spa.trigger: When a Task is created or edited
spa.condition: Task_Outcome is "No Answer" AND Task_Type is "Follow-up 1"

spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: Follow-up 3 on No Answer
spa.trigger: When a Task is created or edited
spa.condition: Task_Outcome is "No Answer" AND Task_Type is "Follow-up 2"

spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: Final Attempt
spa.trigger: When a Task is created or edited
spa.condition: Task_Outcome is "No Answer" AND Task_Type is "Follow-up 3"

task_details.Subject: FINAL Attempt — Call + Last Chance WhatsApp

spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: Callback Scheduled
spa.trigger: When a Task is created or edited

spa.name: [SPA] Auto-Task: Post-Interest Follow-up
spa.trigger: When a Task is created or edited

task_details.Subject: Follow up on Interest — Book Appointment
